disambiguation_rules.secretary: Department of Defense Secretary (primary regulatory authority under this section)

parsing_rules: Extract highly technical specification parameters (e.g., nanometer measurements, Kelvin temperatures, petaflops capacity, floating-point operations thresholds) as contextual details within prohibited technology definitions rather than as separate entities.

oddities.note: Document is a bill preamble/enacting clause only. Substantive content with specific entities (prohibited technologies, notifiable technologies, exemptions, penalties, multilateral engagement strategy) is not present in provided text. Full bill text would be required for comprehensive entity extraction.

llm_disambiguation_log.resolved: Department of Defense Secretary (primary regulatory authority under this section)
